.github/workflows/github-actions-PR-vali.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17 for the PR validation job.

.github/workflows/github-release-build-a.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use Java 21 instead of Java 17 for the build environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler plugin version to a newer release compatible with Java 21.
Change the Maven compiler release target from Java 17 to Java 21 in properties.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode for Java 17 instead of the required Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Lombok dependency to a version that supports Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Explicitly set the release version to 21 in the maven-compiler-plugin configuration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin enforces Java 21 bytecode generation, overriding any default or inherited settings.

src/main/java/org/alliancegenome/mati/en.general_idea: Replace wildcard Lombok import with explicit imports for used annotations.
